'''ragate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zoomorphically|zoomorphically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-g-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zoomorphically|zoomorphically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ragate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:ragate|ragate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ragatesher|ragatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ragatesherĂ«m|ragatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ragatero|ragatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ragateshĂ«|ragateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ragateshĂ«m|ragateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiragatero|gokiragatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiragateshĂ«|gokiragateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiragateshĂ«m|gokiragateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goragankerom|goragankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goragankeshĂ«|goragankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goragankeshĂ«m|goragankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goragankeya|goragankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ragaterom|ragaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ragatemu|ragatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ragateya|ragateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiragaterom|gokiragaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiragatemu|gokiragatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiragateya|gokiragateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:ragagate|ragagate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ragagatesher|ragagatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ragagatesherĂ«m|ragagatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ragagatero|ragagatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ragagateshĂ«|ragagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ragagateshĂ«m|ragagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiragagatero|gokiragagatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiragagateshĂ«|gokiragagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiragagateshĂ«m|gokiragagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goragagankerom|goragagankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goragagankeshĂ«|goragagankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goragagankeshĂ«m|goragagankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goragagankeya|goragagankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ragagaterom|ragagaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ragagatemu|ragagatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ragagateya|ragagateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiragagaterom|gokiragagaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiragagatemu|gokiragagatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiragagateya|gokiragagateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:rĂŠgĂŠte|rĂŠgĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rĂŠgĂŠtesher|rĂŠgĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠgĂŠtesherĂ«m|rĂŠgĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rĂŠgĂŠtero|rĂŠgĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«|rĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m|rĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirĂŠgĂŠtero|gokirĂŠgĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«|gokirĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m|gokirĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorĂŠgĂŠnkerom|gorĂŠgĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«|gorĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gorĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorĂŠgĂŠnkeya|gorĂŠgĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rĂŠgĂŠterom|rĂŠgĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠgĂŠtemu|rĂŠgĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rĂŠgĂŠteya|rĂŠgĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirĂŠgĂŠterom|gokirĂŠgĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirĂŠgĂŠtemu|gokirĂŠgĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirĂŠgĂŠteya|gokirĂŠgĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:rafgafte|rafgafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rafgaftesher|rafgaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafgaftesherĂ«m|rafgaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rafgaftero|rafgaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rafgafteshĂ«|rafgafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafgafteshĂ«m|rafgafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirafgaftero|gokirafgaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirafgafteshĂ«|gokirafgafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirafgafteshĂ«m|gokirafgafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorafgafnkerom|gorafgafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorafgafnkeshĂ«|gorafgafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorafgafnkeshĂ«m|gorafgafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorafgafnkeya|gorafgafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rafgafterom|rafgafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafgaftemu|rafgaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rafgafteya|rafgafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirafgafterom|gokirafgafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirafgaftemu|gokirafgaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirafgafteya|gokirafgafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
